queries.question: Tell me the systems every support specialist works with.
queries.sql: SELECT Systems.system_name  from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id   GROUP BY It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  It_Support_Specialists)

queries.question: Tell me the systems every support specialist works with.
queries.sql: select it_support_specialists.name , systems.system_name from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?system_name WHERE {
  ?it_support_specialists_systems a :It_Support_Specialists_Systems .
  ?systems a :Systems .
  ?it_support_specialists_systems p:hasSystems ?systems .
  ?it_support_specialists a :It_Support_Specialists .
  ?it_support_specialists_systems p:hasIt_Support_Specialists ?it_support_specialists .
  ?it_support_specialists p:name ?name .
  ?systems p:system_name ?system_name .
}

queries.question: which system names and active statuses are associated with every IT support specialist?
queries.sql: SELECT Systems.system_name, Systems.is_active  from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id   GROUP BY It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  It_Support_Specialists)

queries.question: which system names and active statuses are associated with every IT support specialist?
queries.sql: select it_support_specialists.name , systems.system_name , systems.is_active from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id

queries.question: What is the state of the system that each IT support specialist works with?
queries.sql: SELECT Systems.is_active  from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id   GROUP BY It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  It_Support_Specialists)
